name: hcportal_addSong
description: Creates a new song record in HC.Song and immediately links it to the requesting kennel via HC.KennelSongMap. Both inserts are wrapped in a single transaction. The authenticated hasher is recorded as AddedBy_UserId; the resolved internal kennelId as AddedBy_KennelId. ImageUrl, AudioUrl, AutoAddToKennel, and Rank are not set at creation time (ImageUrl/AudioUrl = NULL, AutoAddToKennel = 0, Rank = 0). This is a new SP with no HC5 equivalent.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Resolved to the internal Kennel.id before any writes. Validated IS NULL before auth. Also passed as the paramString to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: songName
parameters.description: Required. Trimmed before insert. Returns error if null or blank after trim.

parameters.name: tuneOf
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: lyrics
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as '' (empty string) if null because Song.Lyrics is NOT NULL.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: actions
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: variants
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Optional. Trimmed; stored as NULL if blank.

parameters.name: bawdyRating
parameters.description: Required. Must be exactly 0, 1, 2, or 3. Validated before insert; returns error if null or out of range.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error. Ordering: publicKennelId null check → auth → songName blank check → bawdyRating range check → kennel not found.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned after the song has been inserted and linked to the kennel.

columns.name: newSongId
columns.description: The id of the newly created HC.Song row

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.Song with the supplied fields; AddedBy_KennelId = resolved @kennelId, AddedBy_UserId = authenticated @hasherId, ImageUrl = NULL, AudioUrl = NULL, AutoAddToKennel = 0, Rank = 0, Removed = 0
INSERT into HC.KennelSongMap linking the new song to the requesting kennel (KennelId = resolved @kennelId, Removed = 0)
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
